misc.title: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released
misc.text: So earth copied Itachi‘s Mangekyou Sharingan design??? Naruto ended 10 years ago but it’s still the most influential Anime of all time😭🙏🏼 #NARUTO The Astronomy Guy (@astrooalert) NASA just released a breathtaking view of Antarctica Community note: This image is not from NASA. No such photo was released by Artemis II. It appears to be a computer-generated illustration, similar to past CGI examples falsely claimed as NASA photos. nasa.gov/artemis-ii/ earthobservatory.nasa.gov/images apnews.com/article/Fact-c… — https://nitter.net/astrooalert/status/2048190323495403835#m

misc.title: Based on a true story btw (And I love them for this) #BORUTO Video

misc.title: Please Ikemoto. For the love of god. Let him be blind. They have to start doing some sacrifices at least when they aren’t dying. This shit is starting to get unrealistic as fuck when they keep survivi
misc.text: Please Ikemoto. For the love of god. Let him be blind. They have to start doing some sacrifices at least when they aren’t dying. This shit is starting to get unrealistic as fuck when they keep surviving without any major injuries… #BORUTO #BorutoTwoBlueVortexCh33

misc.title: Damn those eyes look like Toneri. #BORUTO #BorutoTwoBlueVortexCh33
misc.text: Damn those eyes look like Toneri. #BORUTO #BorutoTwoBlueVortexCh33

misc.title: Hot take: If you hate Griffith but glorify Guts, you missed the entire point of #BERSERK #ベルセルク. One built a kingdom, the other just survived—guess which one actually changed the world.
misc.text: Hot take: If you hate Griffith but glorify Guts, you missed the entire point of #BERSERK #ベルセルク. One built a kingdom, the other just survived—guess which one actually changed the world.

misc.title: Griffith did NOTHING wrong. If you think he’s a villain, you’re either clueless or too soft to grasp what ambition actually costs. Griffith played the game better than anyone—cry about it.
misc.text: Griffith did NOTHING wrong. If you think he’s a villain, you’re either clueless or too soft to grasp what ambition actually costs. Griffith played the game better than anyone—cry about it.
